data.title: scan-docs.sh: _is_binary_fallback uses grep -qP not portable to macOS BSD grep
data.description:
## Incident Overview
Source: code review (passed) — minor finding not addressed in this session.
Finding: _is_binary_fallback() uses 'grep -qP' (Perl regex) which is not supported by macOS BSD grep. On macOS, this causes binary detection to silently return 'not binary' for all files in the fallback path.
File: plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/scan-docs.sh
Category: correctness
Note: Low practical impact — fallback only invoked when 'file' command is absent.
